name: green-driver-weapp
description: 绿化管理系统 - 司机微信小程序

scripts.build:scss: sass --style=expanded --no-source-map app.scss app.wxss && for f in $(find pages -name '*.scss'); do out="${f%.scss}.wxss"; sass --style=expanded --no-source-map "$f" "$out"; done
scripts.build: npm run build:ts && npm run build:scss
scripts.watch: npm run watch:ts & npm run watch:scss
